calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: APPELLANT LATANYA BENSON APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; RESPONDENT DEANNA BRISENO ALSO APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS DAY.

BOTH PARTIES SIGN STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE THIS DATE; THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO THE PARTIES AND TO PROSPECTIVE WITNESSES.

THE COURT HEARS ORAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND RECEIVES, READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE THAT IS PRESENTED.

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MICHELLE BRANT; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).
